positive: Stylized, whimsical illustration of a group of interconnected bioluminescent woodland creatures (fox, owl, deer, bunny) forming a harmonious circular pattern against a deep twilight forest background. The style should be modern, vibrant, and flat-design inspired, with crisp outlines and limited color palette (deep emerald, sapphire blue, gold accents). Focus on high contrast silhouettes and elegant curves. Composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Cinematic, intricate detail, studio lighting, vector art feel, clean edges, magical realism.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, blurry background, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, lowres, muted colors, copyright
